ddls:
CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the creator of the browser */,
  "software_license" INTEGER /* Reference to the software license associated with the browser */,
  "layout_engine" INTEGER /* Reference to the layout engine used by the browser */,
  "current_layout_engine" TEXT /* Current layout engine used by the browser */,
  "initial_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the browser was first released */,
  "latest_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the latest version of the browser */,
  "market_share" TEXT /* Current market share of the browser */,
  "user_rating" TEXT /* Average user rating for the browser */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the browser information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browsers_latest_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("latest_version_id") REFERENCES browser_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browsers_layout_engine FOREIGN KEY ("layout_engine") REFERENCES layout_engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browsers_software_license FOREIGN KEY ("software_license") REFERENCES software_licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browsers_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Name of the creator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the creator */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year when the creator was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the creator's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the creator */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the creator organization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the creator information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the software license */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software license */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., open source, proprietary) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the license text or documentation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the license information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layout_engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layout engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the layout engine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layout engine */,
  "first_released" TEXT /* Date when the layout engine was first released */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the layout engine information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browser_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the browser the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the browser */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the browser version */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the version has been downloaded */,
  "bug_fixes" INTEGER /* Number of bug fixes in the version */,
  "new_features" INTEGER /* Number of new features introduced in the version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the version information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browser_versions_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browser_tags" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the browser the tag is assigned to */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag assigned to the browser */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was assigned to the browser */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who assigned the tag */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the tag assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id", "tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browser_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., contributor, editor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the contribution */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the browser the contribution is about */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., create, edit, delete) */,
  "contribution_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contribution */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the contribution information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the browser information */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the browser being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the browser information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the information */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the information */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend, statistical) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
